content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom C:12 (carbon atom 12) in the molecule. From this visualization, I can clearly see the covalent bonds connected to atom 12:

- Atom C:11 (carbon atom 11) - connected via a bond in the benzene ring
- Atom C:13 (carbon atom 13) - connected via a bond in the benzene ring  
- Atom H:19 (hydrogen atom 19) - connected as a substituent on C:12

These are the three neighbor atoms covalently bonded to atom 12.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file naming convention in the working directory, I can see "geomconf_7611.xyz", which suggests the geomconf_index is 7611.

Let me confirm this by checking if there are any other relevant files or information.

The neighbor atoms of atom 12 (C) are:
- Atom index 11, element C
- Atom index 13, element C  
- Atom index 19, element H

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 7611.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 12, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
